# reports

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Reports uncaught browser errors to the server. Records server/frontend crashes and files deduped tasks.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Core.Root` → `ReportCollector`
  - Uses: `infra/endpoints.fetchEndpoint`, `primitives/error-boundary.registerBoundaryReporter`, `primitives/tab-id.getTabId`
  - Exports: Types: `ReportContext`; Values: `report`
- Server:
  - Uses: `build.getServerBuildId`, `database.db`, `infra/endpoints.implement`, `infra/paths.REPORTS_DIR`, `shell/notifications.recordNotification`, `shell/notifications.setMutedByMetadata`, `tasks/tasks-core.createTask`, `tasks/tasks-core.ensureMetaTask`, `tasks/tasks-core.getTask`
  - DB schema: `plugins/reports/server/internal/schema.ts`, `plugins/reports/server/internal/tables.ts`
  - Exports: Types: `ReportNoiseInput`, `ReportNoiseRuleSpec`; Values: `_reports`, `recordReport`, `ReportNoiseRule`, `REPORTS_META_TASK_ID`, `reportsResource`
  - Resources: `reports` (push)
  - Routes: `POST /api/reports`
- Core:
  - Uses: `primitives/live-state.resourceDescriptor`
  - Exports: Types: `Report`; Values: `ReportSchema`, `reportsResource`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `conversations`, `conversations/model-provider`, `conversations/runtime-tmux`, `infra/health`, `reports/endpoint-errors`, `reports/noise-rules`
- Sub-plugins:
  - **`endpoint-errors`** — Files crash tasks for bug-shaped handled endpoint errors (validation 400s and 5xx).
  - **`launch-fix`** — Adds a Fix button to the plugin crash banner that launches an agent on the auto-created crash task with optional freeform context.
  - **`mutation-errors`** — Warning toast and persistent notification for unhandled TanStack Query mutation errors.
  - **`noise-rules`** — Built-in noise classification rules for low-signal crashes (e.g. ResizeObserver loop warnings).

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
